testimonials.placeholderNote: Placeholder testimonials — real reviews coming soon.
testimonials.review1Text: The online training was straightforward and easy to follow. I completed it in about 3 hours and had my certificate right away. My employer accepted it with no issues.
testimonials.review2Text: We certified 15 operators using their business training kit. The materials are thorough and our trainer was able to get everyone through the program efficiently. Great value for the cost.
testimonials.review3Text: I took the hands-on training in San Diego for the complete bundle. The instructor was patient and knowledgeable. I walked out certified on four different types of equipment in two days.

terms.seoDescription: Terms of service for training and certification programs.
terms.section1Text: By accessing and using the {{domain}} website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use our services. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the platform, including the online forklift certification training courses, examination services, and certification issuance.
terms.section2Text: {{domain}} provides online forklift operator training and certification programs designed to meet {{body}} {{standard}} requirements. Our services include online training content, video-based instruction, knowledge assessments, certificate issuance, certificate verification, and physical wallet card orders. Our training covers the classroom/knowledge-based component of forklift certification. Employers are responsible for providing hands-on practical training and evaluation in accordance with {{body}} requirements.
terms.section3Text: You must create an account to purchase and access training courses. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.section4Text: Certificates are issued upon successful completion of all required training modules and passing the final examination with a minimum score as specified in the course requirements. Certifications are valid for three (3) years from the date of issuance unless otherwise specified. You must complete all training yourself; sharing accounts, having someone else complete training on your behalf, or any form of fraud will result in immediate certificate revocation. Certificates may be verified by employers and regulatory bodies through our online verification system.
terms.section5Text: All prices are listed in U.S. dollars and are subject to change without notice. Payment is required at the time of purchase. We accept major credit cards and other payment methods as displayed during checkout. All sales are subject to our Refund Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. Group purchases and business accounts may have different pricing structures as agreed upon separately.
terms.section6Text: All content on this platform, including but not limited to training materials, videos, images, text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of {{domain}} and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works of, publicly display, or otherwise exploit any content without our prior written consent. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access the training materials for personal educational use only.
terms.section7Text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, {{domain}} shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of our services. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the specific service giving rise to the claim. We do not guarantee that our training alone satisfies all employer-specific safety requirements. Employers remain responsible for ensuring their operators meet all applicable federal, state, and local safety regulations.
terms.section8Text: We reserve the right to revoke any certification if we determine that the training was not completed in good faith, the certificate was obtained fraudulently, or if a refund is issued for the associated course purchase. Revoked certificates will show a "revoked" status on our public verification system. Employers verifying certificates will be informed of the revocation status.
terms.section9Text: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be resolved exclusively in the state or federal courts located in San Diego County, California.
terms.section10Text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Your continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. We encourage you to review these Terms periodically.
terms.section11Text: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at {{email}} or through our Contact page.

privacy.seoDescription: Privacy policy for training and certification programs.
privacy.section1Text: {{domain}} ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your personal information when you visit our website and use our online forklift certification training services. By using our services, you consent to the practices described in this policy.
privacy.section2Text: We collect information you provide directly, including your name, email address, phone number, and payment information when you create an account, purchase courses, or contact us. We also collect usage data such as IP address, browser type, pages viewed, and time spent on our platform. For certification purposes, we collect training completion data, exam scores, and certificate issuance records. When ordering physical wallet cards, we collect shipping address information.
privacy.section3Text: We use your information to provide and maintain our training services, process payments and orders, issue and manage certifications, enable certificate verification by employers, communicate with you about your account and orders, improve our platform and training content, comply with legal obligations and safety regulations, and prevent fraud and unauthorized access. For our public verification system, we display only your first name and last initial to minimize personally identifiable information exposure while still allowing employers to verify certifications.
privacy.section4Text: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with payment processors to process transactions, shipping providers for wallet card delivery, employers or regulatory bodies verifying your certification status (limited to first name, last initial, course name, dates, and certification status), service providers who assist in operating our platform, and as required by law or to protect our legal rights. Group administrators for business accounts may access training progress and certification status for their organization's members.
privacy.section5Text: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encrypted data transmission (SSL/TLS), secure password hashing, session management with secure cookies, and regular security audits. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.section6Text: We retain your account and certification data for the duration of your certification validity period plus an additional seven (7) years to comply with {{body}} recordkeeping requirements and applicable regulations. Training records and exam results are retained as part of your certification documentation. You may request deletion of your account, but please note that certification records must be maintained per regulatory requirements.
privacy.section7Text: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and login status. We may use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our platform. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences. Disabling essential cookies may prevent you from accessing certain features of our platform.
privacy.section8Text: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access the personal information we hold about you, request correction of inaccurate data, request deletion of your personal data (subject to legal retention requirements), opt out of marketing communications, and request a copy of your data in a portable format. California residents have additional rights under the CCPA, including the right to know what personal information is collected, the right to request deletion, and the right to opt out of the sale of personal information.
privacy.section9Text: Our services are not intended for individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected information from a minor, please contact us immediately.
privacy.section10Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.section11Text: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at {{email}} or through our Contact page.

refundPolicy.seoDescription: Refund policy for training and certification programs.
refundPolicy.warningTitle: Important: Refunds After Certification Result in Certificate Revocation
refundPolicy.warningText: If a refund is issued after a certification has been earned, the associated certificate will be <1>permanently revoked</1>. The public verification page will display a <3>REVOKED</3> status visible to any employer or regulatory body verifying the certificate. This action cannot be undone.
refundPolicy.section1Text: We offer refunds under the following conditions: If you have not started any training modules within your purchased course, you may request a full refund within 30 days of purchase. If you have started but not completed training, you may request a refund within 7 days of purchase, subject to a 15% processing fee. No refunds are available after you have completed all training modules, regardless of exam results.
refundPolicy.section2Text: If a refund is granted after a certification has been issued, the following will occur: the certification will be immediately revoked; the certificate status on our public verification system will be changed to "revoked"; any employer or regulatory body checking the verification page will see the revoked status with a prominent visual indicator; any physical wallet cards associated with the certification will be invalidated; the refund will be processed minus applicable processing fees. We strongly advise against requesting refunds after earning your certification.
refundPolicy.section3Text: To request a refund, contact our support team at {{email}} with your order number and the reason for your request. Refund requests are typically processed within 5-10 business days. Approved refunds will be credited to the original payment method. You will receive a confirmation email when the refund has been processed.
refundPolicy.section4Text: Wallet card orders can be cancelled for a full refund before they ship. Once a wallet card has shipped, refunds are not available for shipping costs. If the underlying certification is refunded and revoked, the wallet card order will also be cancelled. Damaged or defective cards will be replaced at no additional cost.
refundPolicy.section5Text: For group or business purchases, refunds are available for unused seats (enrollments not yet assigned or started). Seats where training has been started or completed are not eligible for refund. Group administrators should contact our business support team for refund requests involving multiple seats.
refundPolicy.section6Text: Refunds will not be issued for failure to pass the certification exam, inability to meet employer-specific requirements beyond the scope of our training, technical issues that have been documented and resolved by our support team, or dissatisfaction with {{body}} regulatory requirements that we are obligated to include in training content.
refundPolicy.section7Text: For refund inquiries or to initiate a refund request, please contact us at {{email}} or through our Contact page. Please include your order number and reason for the refund request.

instructor.howItWorksSubtitle: From certified operator to certified instructor in 4 steps
instructor.step1Desc: Fill out the application form below with your experience and qualifications.
instructor.step2Desc: Our team reviews your application within 5-7 business days.
instructor.step3Desc: Approved candidates complete our instructor training program.
instructor.step4Desc: Get matched with training sessions in your area and start earning.
instructor.applicationSubtitle: Complete the form below to apply. All fields marked are required.
instructor.submittedDesc: Thank you for your interest in becoming a {{brand}} instructor. We'll review your application and contact you within 5-7 business days.
instructor.teachingExpLabel: I have previous teaching or training experience
instructor.willingToTravel: I'm willing to travel for training sessions
instructor.whyInstructor: Why do you want to become a {{brand}} instructor?
instructor.faq1a: You need a valid {{brand}} certification and real-world forklift operating experience. Teaching experience is preferred but not required — we provide instructor training.
instructor.faq2q: How much can I earn as an instructor?
instructor.faq2a: Instructors earn competitive per-session rates based on training type, location, and experience. Rates vary and are discussed during the onboarding process.
instructor.faq3q: Is this a full-time or part-time opportunity?
instructor.faq3a: Both! You set your own availability. Many instructors teach part-time alongside other work, while some choose to teach full-time.
instructor.faq4q: What does the application process look like?
instructor.faq4a: After submitting your application, our team reviews your qualifications within 5-7 business days. Approved candidates complete our instructor onboarding program before being assigned sessions.
instructor.faq5a: We have on-site training requests across Southern California, Central California, and Southern Nevada. You'll be matched with sessions in your area.
instructor.certRequiredDesc: You need a valid {{brand}} certification to apply as an instructor.
instructor.appSubmittedToastDesc: We'll review your application and get back to you within 5-7 business days.

docs.docChecklistDesc: Pre-use inspection checklists for all powered industrial truck types including electric forklifts, propane forklifts, yard forklifts, reach trucks, order pickers, tow tractors, and pallet trucks.
docs.docPerformanceDesc: Supervisor-conducted performance test to evaluate operator proficiency, safety knowledge, and equipment handling before, during, and after operation.
docs.docPermitDesc: Permit to operate form for documenting forklift operator authorization, certification details, and employer/employee information per {{body}} regulations.
docs.docAttendanceDesc: Safety training session attendance form for recording employee names, dates, times, and signatures.
docs.docPresentationDesc: Comprehensive {{body}}-compliant PIT operator certification training presentation covering all 7 equipment classes, tire types, fuel types, attachments, regulatory framework, safe operating procedures, and certification process.

supportPage.title: How Can We Help?
supportPage.subtitle: Chat with our AI assistant for instant answers, or reach out to our team directly.
supportPage.messageLimit: You've reached the message limit for this session. For further assistance, please use the contact form below.
supportPage.connectionError: Connection issue. Please try again or use the contact form.
supportPage.disclaimer: This assistant provides general guidance. For official {{body}} compliance questions, consult a certified safety professional.
supportPage.placeholderMessage: Tell us about your training needs...
supportPage.messageSentDesc: We will get back to you within one business day.
supportPage.errorDesc: Failed to send message. Please try again.
supportPage.missingFieldsDesc: Please fill in all required fields.
supportPage.messageTooShortDesc: Please provide more details in your message.

onsiteTraining.pageSubtitle: We bring certified forklift training directly to your facility. Fill out the form below and our team will review your preferred dates and follow up shortly.
onsiteTraining.pageNote: We will confirm trainer availability before scheduling. No payment required to request.
onsiteTraining.preferredDatesNote: Provide up to 3 preferred dates. Availability is not guaranteed until confirmed.
onsiteTraining.notesPlaceholder: Tell us about your equipment, shift schedules, specific {{body}} requirements, or anything else we should know...
onsiteTraining.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us at {{phone}}.
onsiteTraining.noPaymentNote: No payment required. We'll contact you to confirm availability and pricing before scheduling.
onsiteTraining.benefitFacility: Training happens at your facility with your actual equipment
onsiteTraining.benefitGroups: Ideal for groups of 5 or more operators
onsiteTraining.travelNote: Travel fees may apply outside our standard service areas. All details included in your quote.
onsiteTraining.servingAreas: Serving Southern California, Las Vegas, and surrounding areas
onsiteTraining.successMessage: Our team will review your preferred dates and follow up shortly. We've also sent a confirmation to your email.
onsiteTraining.step1: Check your inbox for a confirmation email
onsiteTraining.step2: Our team reviews your preferred dates
onsiteTraining.step3: We contact you within 1–2 business days to confirm the schedule
onsiteTraining.step4: Training is conducted at your facility

bookTraining.seoDescription: Book on-site forklift certification training. Choose your date, time, and training type. {{body}}-aligned programs with real-time availability.
bookTraining.pageSubtitle: Schedule hands-on forklift certification at your facility. Check availability, pick a date, and submit your booking in minutes.
bookTraining.enterZipDesc: Enter your ZIP code to see if on-site training is available in your area.
bookTraining.areaAvailable: On-site training is available! Service area: {{area}}
bookTraining.areaNotAvailable: Not currently available in your area
bookTraining.areaNotAvailableDesc: We currently serve Southern California, Central California, and Southern Nevada.
bookTraining.selectTrainingDesc: Select one or more training programs and/or equipment types you need certification for.
bookTraining.orSelectEquipment: Or select equipment types for a custom quote
bookTraining.chooseDateTimeDesc: Select an available date and time slot for your training session.
bookTraining.noSlotsForDate: No available time slots for this date. Please try another date.
bookTraining.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Any specific {{body}} requirements, equipment needs, shift schedules, or other details...
bookTraining.noPaymentNote: No payment required now. We will confirm your booking and send pricing details.
bookTraining.bookingFailed: Booking could not be completed. Please try again.
bookTraining.noSelections: Make your selections to see a summary.
bookTraining.equipmentPricingNote: Equipment pricing will be confirmed by our team after submission.
bookTraining.subjectToConfirmation: Selected dates and times are subject to trainer availability confirmation. Our team will reach out to finalize.
bookTraining.benefit1: Certified instructor comes to your facility
bookTraining.benefit2: Groups of any size — individuals to full teams
bookTraining.preferSimpleRequest: Prefer a simple request form instead?
bookTraining.successMessage: Your training booking has been submitted. We'll review availability and confirm your session shortly.
bookTraining.nextStep1: Check your inbox for a confirmation email
bookTraining.nextStep2: Our team reviews and confirms your booking
bookTraining.nextStep3: Training is conducted at your location on the scheduled date

businessPage.heroSubtitle: Train and certify your entire workforce online or at one of our facilities. Volume pricing, crew management, and OSHA-aligned programs.
businessPage.onlineTrackSubtitle: Purchase seats for your team and let everyone train at their own pace. Volume pricing kicks in at 5 seats — the more you buy, the more you save.
businessPage.volumePricingDesc: Per-seat pricing decreases as your team grows.
businessPage.benefit1Desc: Team members complete training on any device, 24/7. No travel or scheduling conflicts.
businessPage.benefit2Desc: Self-paced OSHA-aligned curriculum. Printable certificate issued immediately upon completion.
businessPage.benefit3Desc: Invite members, assign seats, track progress, and download certificates from one place.
businessPage.benefit4Desc: Training covers all OSHA 1910.178 requirements for powered industrial truck operators.
businessPage.trustComplianceDesc: All programs aligned with federal OSHA standards
businessPage.trustTeamDesc: Volume discounts for organizations training multiple operators
businessPage.trustScalableDesc: Solutions that grow with your workforce needs
businessPage.onsiteTrackSubtitle: Need hands-on certification with real equipment? Book instructor-led training at one of our locations.
businessPage.selectPrompt: Select the training programs you need, then continue to booking.
businessPage.needCustomOnsite: Need training at your facility instead? We can come to you.
businessPage.ctaSubtitle: Start with online certification or book on-site training. Either way, your team will be OSHA-compliant and job-ready.

trainTheTrainerPage.heroSubtitle: Become a certified forklift training instructor. Qualify to train and certify operators at your own facility and reduce long-term training costs.
trainTheTrainerPage.whyBecomeTrainerDesc: Having a certified trainer on staff gives your organization the flexibility to manage operator certification internally, saving time and money.
trainTheTrainerPage.reason1Desc: Certify operators in-house without scheduling third-party trainers
trainTheTrainerPage.reason2Desc: Eliminate per-operator third-party training fees across your organization
trainTheTrainerPage.reason3Desc: Train new hires and provide refresher training on your own timeline
trainTheTrainerPage.ctaSubtitle: Invest in a Train the Trainer certification and gain the ability to train unlimited operators at your facility.

locationsHubPage.title: Training Location
locationsHubPage.subtitle: In-person training at our San Diego facility or on-site at your location. {{body}}-aligned certification with hands-on evaluation.
locationsHubPage.facilityDesc: Walk-in and scheduled training at our Miramar facility. Individual and group sessions available with same-day certification.
locationsHubPage.onSiteDesc: Our certified trainers travel to your warehouse, distribution center, or job site anywhere in the San Diego metro area.
locationsHubPage.inPersonDesc: Hands-on training with real equipment at our Miramar location. Classroom instruction plus practical evaluation.
locationsHubPage.groupsDesc: From individual operators to company teams. Volume pricing available for groups of 5 or more.
locationsHubPage.sameDayDesc: Complete your training and receive your {{body}}-aligned certification the same day.

onlineTrainingPage.heroSubtitle: Complete your {{body}}-aligned forklift operator training online. Self-paced, mobile-friendly, with instant certification.
onlineTrainingPage.individualDesc: Complete your training from anywhere, on any device. Available in English and Spanish.
onlineTrainingPage.teamDesc: Train multiple operators with admin dashboard and progress tracking.
onlineTrainingPage.ctaSubtitle: We also offer in-person certification at our San Diego training facility or on-site at your location.

handsOnPage.heroSubtitle: On-site certification at your facility. Our trainers come to you with classroom instruction plus practical evaluation on real equipment. We will confirm trainer availability before scheduling.
handsOnPage.checkYourAreaDesc: Enter your ZIP code to see if on-site training is available at your location.
handsOnPage.serviceAreasDesc: We provide on-site training in the San Diego metro area
handsOnPage.sanDiegoFacilityDesc: In-person training at our Miramar location
handsOnPage.availableProgramsDesc: All hands-on training programs available for on-site request
handsOnPage.atYourFacilityDesc: Our trainers come to your warehouse or job site — no travel needed for your team.
handsOnPage.flexibleGroupsDesc: From 1 to 20+ operators. Training that fits your team's needs and schedule.
handsOnPage.sameDayCertDesc: Receive your {{body}}-aligned certificate and operator ID the same day as your training.
handsOnPage.ctaSubtitle: Our online training program lets you complete your {{body}}-aligned certification from anywhere.

businessProductsPage.heroSubtitle: Everything your organization needs for in-house forklift training. Certification kits, operator cards, trainer materials, and more.
businessProductsPage.certMaterialsDesc: Essential materials for your training program.
businessProductsPage.ctaSubtitle: We can build a training program tailored to your organization's specific equipment and requirements.

standingSessions.title: Standing Sessions
standingSessions.subtitle: Recurring weekly training slots for regular B2B customers. Set up a template and slots auto-generate each week.
standingSessions.emptyDescription: A standing session is a recurring weekly training slot for a regular customer. Set one up and bookings appear automatically each week.
